explanation_cards.headline: Having a child adds time
explanation_cards.detail: Custody schedule negotiation typically adds 12 days to the collaborative path.
explanation_cards.what_you_can_do: A pre-agreed co-parenting schedule reduces this significantly.

explanation_cards.headline: No business to value saves time
explanation_cards.detail: Cases without shared business assets resolve 8 days faster on average.

explanation_cards.headline: Property valuation takes time
explanation_cards.detail: Joint property in Pune requires independent valuation, adding 6 days.
explanation_cards.what_you_can_do: Your CA has already been assigned to coordinate this.

explanation_cards.headline: Your urgency level helps
explanation_cards.detail: Medium urgency keeps professionals responsive without creating pressure.
